description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named python-tests that runs on every push to any branch, on every pull request to any branch, and on a scheduled basis on Wednesdays and Saturdays. Use a single ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out two repositories, sets up Python 3.8 and Pandoc 2.9.2.1, installs dependencies, lints with flake8, and runs tests with pytest in two different directories.
